title: Real Tevar
subTitle: Harsha is the idealistic scion of a self-made multimillionaire, Ravikanth. After a chance meeting with Charuseela leads him to a remote village, Harsha wishes to develop it with her help.

title: Cycle Kick
subTitle: The lives of two brothers change when they find an abandoned bicycle. However, their happiness is short-lived when the two-wheeler is stolen from them.

title: 102 Not Out
subTitle: Dattatraya Vakharia, a 102-year-old man with the heart of a child, lives with his 75-year-old son, Babulal. Full of energy, he aims to break the world record for the oldest man alive.

title: Badle Ki Raat Revenge
subTitle: A honeymooning couple, Karthik and Sravani, move into their new farmhouse. Before long, the couple are disturbed by strange events that make their beautiful home seem ominous.

title: Cycle Kick
subTitle: The lives of two brothers change when they find an abandoned bicycle. However, their happiness is short-lived when the two-wheeler is stolen from them.

title: Chandu Champion
subTitle: An extraordinary man confronts relentless challenges with unwavering determination. His spirit and resilience propel him through adversity, ultimately forging a path to historic achievement.

title: Vanvaas
subTitle: After being abandoned by his sons, an elderly father grappling with dementia embarks on a life-changing journey. He is aided by a cunning thief who is determined to reunite him with his family.

title: Holiday: A Soldier Is Never off Duty
subTitle: An army intelligence officer arrives in Mumbai to spend the holiday with his family. However, he must switch back to work mode after a bomb rips through the heart of the city.

title: Dabangg
subTitle: Chulbul Pandey, a police officer, battles a corrupt political leader, Cheddi Singh, who strains Chulbul's relationship with his step-brother.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: Zee Cine Awards 2026

title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
subTitle: Ramkishan and Mamta lead a happy life with their three sons. But when their daughter faces a tragedy, Mamta gets instigated by her close friends, and she embitters her heart towards her stepson Vivek.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

title: Dabangg 2
subTitle: Inspector Chulbul Pandey oversees the operations of the local police station in Kanpur. However, things take a turn when he kills the brother of a local politician.

title: Operation Java
subTitle: A team of police officers from the Kochi cyber cell embarks on a mission to investigate a series of mysterious crimes and unlawful activities.

title: Raja Saheb Ka Kamra
subTitle: A television channel decides to host a reality show in a haunted house with seven contestants. The ghosts, however, have their own motives and obstruct the organisers' plans.

title: Saaho
subTitle: An undercover agent and his partner go after a thief who has stolen 2,000 crore rupees. Soon, they realise that the case is linked to the death of a crime lord and an emerging gang war.

title: Main Khiladi Tu Anari
subTitle: A Bombay police officer seeks revenge when a drug dealer kills his brother. However, things get complicated when a film star begins to tag along, so that he can research a film role.

title: Jai Ho
subTitle: A former Indian military officer devises a unique plan to promote social responsibility amongst apathetic civilians. The masses embrace his initiative, but he must confront a potent political family.

title: Ramaiya Vastavaiya
subTitle: A man is challenged to work in a field and produce a huge harvest by the end of the season in order to marry the love of his life.

title: Simmba
subTitle: Inspector Simmba is a corrupt officer who works for a major smuggler. He finds his values challenged as the gangster's brothers assault his sworn sister.

title: Skanda: The Attacker
subTitle: After Rayudu and Ranjith Reddy's children elope, the CMs turn against each other. However, when a college student kidnaps Reddy's daughter, a revenge saga unravels.

title: Satyameva Jayate
subTitle: DCP Shivansh is given a case to arrest the man responsible for the deaths of corrupt police officers. He begins his search without realising the killer is none other than Vir, his younger brother.

title: Satyameva Jayate
subTitle: DCP Shivansh is given a case to arrest the man responsible for the deaths of corrupt police officers. He begins his search without realising the killer is none other than Vir, his younger brother.

title: The Real Tiger
subTitle: An undercover cop, who is also the son of an MLA, strives to apprehend a dangerous don who is involved in illicit activities.

title: Daring Baaz
subTitle: Goutham resolves to reunite his grandfather with Sunanda, his estranged aunt. However, he chooses to pose as a driver to befriend her.

title: Dhartiputra
subTitle: Yashpal tries to rape Jeeva and her husband, Shiva, stops him while she manages to escape. However, Yashpal kills him and she vows to avenge his death.

title: Vijay The Master
subTitle: Troubled alcoholic teacher JD goes to work at a juvenile reform school. When he realises a dangerous criminal is using students to cover up his crimes, JD sets out to stop him.

title: A Flying Jatt
subTitle: Donning a mighty cape and a heart of gold, a quirky Punjabi superhero whooshes through low-altitude escapades and fights the humongous villain who threatens the world.

title: Saamy 2
subTitle: Ramasamy, who works as a front-end receptionist for Union Minister Viswanathan, decides to pursue civil service. Soon, Viswanathan's daughter falls in love with him after he saves her from gangsters.

title: Surya The Soldier
subTitle: When a soldier lands in trouble due to his anger issues, he begins seeing a psychologist in hopes of one day returning to duty.

title: Gadar 2
subTitle: Upon learning about his father's disappearance at the border, Jeete believes that his father is captured and sets out to rescue him in Pakistan.

title: Tehran
subTitle: An officer tries to expose the truth about an explosive detonation within Delhi in 2012. However, his country abandons him during his quest and he falls in the crosshairs of Iran.
